title: LunaHardcore SMP
description: A refined vanilla+ client modpack focused on performance, subtle gameplay enhancements, animated textures, and multiplayer quality-of-life for smooth SMP gameplay.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9fa4c27583a6d2a8ad8c10135f7e1f506f654d5d.png)

---

### 🌿 **LunaHardcore Official SMP Modpack**

The **official SMP modpack** built by **Team Luna**.

**LunaHardcore** refines vanilla Minecraft with carefully curated vanilla-plus content, designed primarily for **Hardcore SMP gameplay**.  
While fully playable in non-hardcore worlds, every system and balance choice is made with Hardcore survival in mind.

The result is a demanding, immersive SMP experience that stays true to vanilla.

---

### ⚙️ Built for Hardcore First

* Performance focused for stable FPS and long play sessions  
* Optimized memory usage and reduced stuttering  
* Tuned for high-risk Hardcore survival  
* Still fully playable in standard survival worlds  

---

### 🌾 Vanilla Plus Content

* **Farmer’s Delight** with extensive addon compatibility  
* The complete **Let’s Do** series expanding farming, food, nature, building, and atmosphere  
* Decorative expansion with **Decocraft**, **DecoNature**, **Decorative Food**, and **Decorative Lamps**  
* Cozy interiors, detailed bases, and lived-in villages without breaking vanilla balance  
* Balanced progression with no heavy tech or magic systems  

---

### 🏰 Exploration and Challenge

* Full structure set from **Dungeons and Taverns**  
* **Luki’s Crazy Chambers** expanding and enhancing Trial Chambers  
* **Repurposed Structures** adding new vanilla-style structure variants  
* New vanilla-style mobs from **Friends & Foes**  
* Expanded Illager encounters from **Illager Invasion**  
* Exploration and combat designed to matter  

---

### 🧑 Villagers, Items and World Depth

* **More Villagers: Re-Employed** adding new professions and workstations  
* **More Villagers: Missing Buildings** ensuring villages generate correctly  
* **More Armor Trims** adding additional discoverable trims  
* **More Music Discs** expanding ambient and collectible music  
* **Mine Spawners** allowing spawners to be mined with Silk Touch  
* **Elevator Mod** for clean and intuitive vertical movement  

---

### 🐾 Companions & Immersion

* **Doggy Talents Next** expanding wolves with talents, leveling, and commands  
* **Cozy’s Improved Cats** enhancing cat behavior while staying close to vanilla  
* Pets feel useful and immersive without trivializing Hardcore survival  

---

### 🧭 Clarity and Quality of Life

* Extensive use of **EMI** for recipes and progression clarity  
* **EMIffect** providing detailed information about status effects  
* **Grind Enchantments** allowing enchantments to be recovered via grindstone  
* **Accessories** system for utility items without inventory clutter  
* **Freelook** for camera awareness without movement advantages  
* Subtle visual polish, animated textures, and optional shader support  

---

### 🎙️ Multiplayer Ready

* Designed specifically for SMP gameplay  
* Integrated **Simple Voice Chat**  
* Player-driven survival, building, and trading  

---

### ❤️ Hardcore Revive+ System

Hardcore Revive+ adds a **structured revive system** to Hardcore gameplay.  
Death remains meaningful, but recovery is intentional, costly, and fully survival-focused.

**⚠️ Important:**  
Players are **strongly advised to carefully read the Modrinth page of this modpack**, as the revive system has specific rules, limitations, and configuration details.

#### 👻 Ghost State

* When a player loses all lives, they become a **ghost**  
* Ghosts are spectators and cannot continue normal survival  
* Players remain part of the world until revived  

#### 💎 Soul Charm (Revive Item)

![Soul Charm](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a35eab05eb6d3511d2355d980c573bac2e9ff67.png)

* Craft a **Soul Charm**  
* Drop it on the ground  
* When a ghost touches it, the player is revived  
* Revival grants a **set number of lives**  

#### 🍯 Life Jam (Regain Lives)

![Life Jam](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04ed2fbff0f4b4a62489c944cc9ee6d945e26cf1.webp)

* Craft **Life Jam** to restore lost lives  
* Consuming Life Jam restores lives up to the configured maximum  
* Encourages careful recovery instead of reckless play  

---

### ⚠️ Hardcore Focus Disclaimer

This modpack is **designed for Hardcore gameplay**.  
While playable in non-hardcore mode, balance and progression are tuned around high-risk survival where mistakes have lasting consequences.

---

### ⭐ Summary

Vanilla Minecraft refined for **Hardcore-focused SMP gameplay**.  
Deeper farming, richer exploration, expanded villages, immersive decoration, meaningful companions, and a structured Hardcore revive system all without losing the vanilla feel.

---
